questionHtml:
How many oxygen atoms are present in 0.0500 mol Ba(OH)2•8H2O?

NA = 6.02 × 1023

 

A.   3.01 × 1023

B.   6.02 × 1023

C.   3.01 × 1024

D.   6.02 × 1024

meta.title: How many oxygen atoms are present in 0.0500 mol Ba(OH)2•8H2O? NA = 6.02 × 1023 A. 3.01 × 1023 B. 6.02 × 1023 C. 3.01 × 1024 D. 6.02 × 1024
